_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
**WINDOW CLOSING — UK MEES EPC C Deadline Approaching**
Any warehouse or staging facility leased or occupied in England or Wales must hold an EPC (Energy Performance Certificate) rating of C or above to be legally let from 2027 under the proposed UK Minimum Energy Efficiency Standards (MEES) uplift. *Source: UK Government MEES Guidance, https://www.gov.uk/guidance/domestic-private-rented-property-minimum-energy-efficiency-standard-landlord-guidance* — Legal Confirmation Required: the current published MEES guidance references domestic properties; the commercial property MEES trajectory (EPC E now, EPC C by 2027, EPC B by 2030) has been subject to government consultation. The workspace should obtain legal confirmation of the current commercial MEES position and its applicability to any UK logistics facilities it occupies or leases, before lease renewals are signed.

**MONITORING — LEED v5 Now Current Version**
LEED v5 is now the current rating system for new construction and existing buildings, including warehouses. Any new facility the workspace leases from a developer pursuing LEED certification will be assessed under v5, which shifts credit weightings toward performance metrics tracked via the Arc platform. *Source: USGBC, "Applying LEED to Warehouse and Distribution Center Projects," March 2026.*

**MONITORING — EU Energy Performance of Buildings Directive (EPBD) Recast**
The EU EPBD recast requires all buildings to reach zero-emission status by 2050, with intermediate milestones. For logistics facilities across the workspace's European trade lanes, this creates a trajectory of increasing landlord capital investment requirements that will pass through into lease terms and facility availability. *Source: EU EPBD Recast, https://energy.ec.europa.eu/topics/energy-efficiency/energy-efficient-buildings/energy-performance-buildings-directive_en*

---
